stages.name: setup
stages.message: pyshacl 0.31.0, rdflib, datasets, anthropic installed in tasks/.venv-tasks (Python 3.12). Local copies of croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl and croissant-tasks.ttl used for validation.

stages.name: paper_analysis
stages.message: Paper read in full. Task definition, three domains (poetry, numerical, github_prs), micro-F1 + element-level exact match metric, and Table 3 baselines extracted. Two of 16 reported baselines materialized as TaskSolutions (claude-3-7-sonnet ±thinking).

stages.name: problem_generated
stages.message: absencebench_problem.jsonld written with three subTasks, shared OutputSpec referencing a RecordSet with a single repeated string Field, and EvaluationSpec declaring F1-Score and Exact Match.

stages.name: solutions_generated
stages.message: Two paper-reported TaskSolution files written (claude-3-7-sonnet, claude-3-7-sonnet-thinking). One ct2code-produced TaskSolution also lives in this directory (absencebench_claude-4-sonnet_solution.jsonld) - that one is documented in raw_outputs/<model>/manifest_*.json and is not part of this pdf2ct validation report.

stages.name: json_validity
stages.message: All four JSON-LD files parse as JSON and as RDF graphs (rdflib json-ld parser).

stages.name: shacl_conformance
stages.message: SHACL validation could not be performed against any of our four JSON-LD files. Two distinct shape bugs in tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl block our paths. Bug A (TaskProblemShape spec constraint): outer sh:property whose body is sh:or of alternatives has no sh:path; pyshacl rejects with 'exists but is not a well-formed SHACL PropertyShape'. Hits absencebench_problem.jsonld and Leo's own tasks/testdata/valid_problem.jsonld. Bug B (EvaluationTaskShape evaluatedSolution cardinality): croissant:evaluatedSolution uses sh:qualifiedMinCount 1 with no corresponding sh:qualifiedValueShape; pyshacl rejects with 'QualifiedValueShapeConstraintComponent must have at least one sh:qualifiedValueShape predicate'. Hits all three of our TaskSolution files (which carry EvaluationTask blocks). Both bugs match items on the team's known-issue list as identified during the RISEBench experiment (Slack, 2026-04-29): Change 2 ('Fix TaskProblemShape spec constraint') and Change 4 ('Fix evaluatedSolution cardinality'). Per team guidance from that thread we deliberately did NOT modify the spec files (.ttl); we use _structural_check.py (rdflib-only) as a substitute - see per_file rows for status. Validator state on simpler inputs is healthier than yesterday: tasks/testdata/valid_solution.jsonld and tasks/testdata/direct_task.jsonld now PASS, so Leo's recent shape fixes did help, just not on the two shapes our files exercise.

upstream_issues.where: tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl :: TaskProblemShape (the 'must have at least one Spec' constraint)
upstream_issues.summary: Outer sh:property whose body is sh:or of alternative {sh:path + sh:class} pairs has no sh:path on the outer property shape; pyshacl 0.22-0.31 rejects with 'exists but is not a well-formed SHACL PropertyShape'.
upstream_issues.matches_known_issue: RISEBench agent analysis Change 2 ('Fix TaskProblemShape spec constraint') from Slack thread on 2026-04-29.
upstream_issues.suggested_fix: Lift sh:or out of the inner sh:property to NodeShape level, with each alternative being a full sh:property (own sh:path, own sh:class, own sh:minCount 1).
upstream_issues.workaround: _structural_check.py at runs/<run_id>/infra/ - rdflib-only checks of expected types, refs, and spec-leak rules. Drop when shapes file is fixed.

upstream_issues.summary: Property shape uses sh:qualifiedMinCount 1 with no corresponding sh:qualifiedValueShape; pyshacl 0.22-0.31 rejects with 'QualifiedValueShapeConstraintComponent must have at least one sh:qualifiedValueShape predicate'.
upstream_issues.matches_known_issue: RISEBench agent analysis Change 4 ('Fix evaluatedSolution cardinality').
upstream_issues.suggested_fix: Replace sh:qualifiedMinCount 1 with sh:minCount 1 + sh:maxCount 1 (the cardinality the constraint actually wants is 'exactly 1').

spec_modifications_made_in_this_run: NONE. Per team guidance in the 2026-04-29 Slack thread (Omar: 'we should not allow them to do that'; Leo: 'ignore the croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl. The shapes are only important for the validator.'), this run deliberately does NOT modify tasks/croissant-tasks.ttl or tasks/croissant-tasks-shapes.ttl. The two SHACL bugs above are documented and worked around, not patched.
